snippet.description:

#Suriya #MamithaBaiju #GVPrakash #VenkyAtluri

Vishwanath & Sons is an upcoming Tamil-Telugu film, starring Suriya, Mamitha Baiju, Radhika Sarathkumar, and Raveena Tandon in pivotal roles. Directed by Venky Atluri, the film is produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi and Sai Soujanya under Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas, and presented by Srikara Studios.

Featuring music by G. V. Prakash Kumar, cinematography by Nimish Ravi, editing by Navin Nooli, and production design by Banglan.

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of вАЬALPHAвАЭ

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

вЦЇ Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY рЯФФ Stay updated!
вЦЇ YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

рЯОђ Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
вЦЇ Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
вЦЇ Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
вЦЇ Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
вЦЇ Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinemaвАЩs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

вЦЇ Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
вЦЇ Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinemaвАЩs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar 


#AayegaMazaAbBarsaatKa #Andaaz #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AkshayKumar #PriyankaChopra #LaraDutta #RomanticSong #RainSong #BollywoodSongs #HindiSongs #EvergreenHits #NadeemShravan #Sameer #ShreeKrishnaInternational

localized.title: Grand Theft Auto VI: Official Cover Art Reveal
localized.description:
Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers.

Check out the official cover art, also available as downloadable artwork at rockstargames.com/VI

рЯОµ Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (а§®а§Є а§®а§Є а§Ха•На§ѓа•Ла§В а§¶а•Ва§Ца•И)
рЯО≠ Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
рЯО§ Singers: Diler Kharkiya
рЯУЭ Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
рЯОЉ Music: JPS Music

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

Lyrics:-
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

snippet.title: Ananthan Kaadu Trailer (Tamil) | Arya | Jiyen Krishnakumar | Ajaneesh Loknath | Murali Gopy
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of Ananthan Kaadu starring Arya in the lead role.

Ananthan Kaadu arrives in theatres on 25 June 2026.

Directed by Jiyen Krishnakumar, written by Murali Gopy, and produced by S. Vinod Kumar under the banner of Mini Studio's. Music composed by B. Ajaneesh Loknath.

Cast:
Arya, Indrans, , Sunil, Nikhila Vimal,  Regena Cassandrra, Siddique, Ajay, Bose Venkat, Dev Mohan, Renji Panicker, Anjali P Nair, Santhy Balachandran, Achyuth Kumar, Vijayaraghavan, Sagar Surya, Alsyn Benny, Sarath Appani

Singer: Deepak Blue

snippet.description:
Presenting brand new Bollywood song "Deewane Hain" from the highly anticipated movie Welcome to the Jungle. Sung by the incredible Amruta Fadnavis and Anand Raaj Anand, this track is set to recreate the nostalgic magic that audiences have loved for years!

Featuring a brilliant fusion of Kashmiri folk lyrics "Rakshida Rakshida," this high-energy track also features a massive star-studded cast that will surely blow your mind!

en.title: Deewane Hain | Welcome to the Jungle | Amruta Fadnavis, Anand Raaj Anand | In Cinemas 26 June
en.description:
Presenting brand new Bollywood song "Deewane Hain" from the highly anticipated movie Welcome to the Jungle. Sung by the incredible Amruta Fadnavis and Anand Raaj Anand, this track is set to recreate the nostalgic magic that audiences have loved for years!

Featuring a brilliant fusion of Kashmiri folk lyrics "Rakshida Rakshida," this high-energy track also features a massive star-studded cast that will surely blow your mind!

рЯСЙрЯПї SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

 https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

The unspoken promise of love. вЭ§пЄП

Experience the heartfelt melody "Tere Paas Main" from the film Main Vaapas Aaunga. A soulful song that beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and the silent bond that keeps two hearts connected.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaagaz Pe Koi Nazam Likhi Hai
Saanson Mein Likkhi/Rehti Nazam 
Jaise Paani Paas Pyaase
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Dil Ke Hain Dilaase
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jhooth Hain Ye Dooriyan
Jhooth Faasla Hai
Tujhe Roz Mil Raha Hun Main
Baat Ho Khayal Mein  
Jaise Honthon Mein Ho Laali
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaanon Mein Ho Baali
Tere Paas Main
 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main
 
Apni Kahani Utni Rahegi
Chaahe Badha Lo Chaahe Ghata Lo
Kajal Nahin Main Gaalon Ka Til Hun
Mit Ta Nahin Main Kitna Mita Lo
Mera To Hatna Mushqil Bada Hai 
Tum Saamne Se Sheesha Hata Lo 
Jaise Aankhon Ke Ishaare 
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Nadiya Ke Kinaare 
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jaise Neeci Nazar Mein Sharam Chhupi Hai
Saanson Mein Rehti Nazam
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main

snippet.title: рЯПЖ Franklin Steals The World Cup Trophy To Save Messi & Ronaldo! рЯШ± | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
вЪљ The Football Story Continues!

Franklin and Neymar face the powerful football robots in the final penalty shootout. Just when victory seems impossible, Franklin steps up and becomes the goalkeeper!

Meanwhile, Shinchan, Messi and Ronaldo are trapped by the evil American Boss. After escaping, Shinchan reveals the shocking truth to Franklin.

Can Franklin rescue Messi and Ronaldo before it's too late? рЯШ±

рЯТ£ A dangerous TNT trap...
рЯПЖ A World Cup Trophy heist...
рЯЪТ A heroic rescue mission...
вЪљ And the biggest football adventure ever!

Watch till the end for the epic finale!

#Franklin #Shinchan #GTA5Malayalam #Messi #Ronaldo #Neymar #Football

snippet.title: а§Па§Х а§¶а§ња§≤ а§єа•И | Ek Dil Hai | Tujhe Pyar Se Dekhne Wala | Akshay Kumar, Karisma | Alka & Kumar
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Ek Dil Hai - Lyrical 
Singers: Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer
Edit & Gfx: Nadeem Akhtar (Paperboyz Studioz)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Movie: Ek Rishtaa
Producer: Suneel Darshan
Director: Suneel Darshan
Cast: Akshay Kumar, Karisma Kapoor, Juhi Chawla, Amitabh Bachchan, Raakhee

Lyrics:
Main Tootke Sanam Aise Hi Tujhe Chahoongi
Teri Aankhon Se Kabhi Door Nahin Jaaoongi
Kasam Hai Tujhko Mere Saajna Mohabbat Ki
Main Saath Phero Ke Saato Wachan Nibhaoongi
Tujhe Pyar Se Dekhne Wala
Tujhe Apna Samajhne Wala
Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hi Toh Hai
Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hi Toh Hai
 
Tujhe Pyar Se Dekhne Wala
Tujhe Apna Samajhne Wala
Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hi Toh Hai
Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hi Toh Hai
 
Tere Liye Sab Ko Main Aaj Dilbar
Chhod Ke Aayi
Rasmo Ke Kasmo Ke Saare Bandhan
Todke Aayi
 
Dekho Main Toh Dekhoon Sone Yaar Ko Jab
Palkein Uthaoon
Zindagi Bana Ke Meri Jaan Ko Main
Saanson Mein Basaoon
 
Tere Ishq Mein Doobne Wala
Tujhe Har Pal Dhoondne Wala
Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hi Toh Hai
Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hi Toh Hai
 
Aaja Teri Sooni Sooni Maang Ko Main
Taaron Se Bhar Doon
Sajni Deewani Saari Umr Ab Main
Tere Naam Kar Doon
 
Saari Duniya Ko Main To Bhool Baithi
Baahon Mein Aake
Aisa Laga Sab Kuch Paa Liya Hai
Tera Pyaar Paake
 
Tere Khwaab Sajane Waala
Teri Duniya Basane Waala
Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hai, Ek Dil Hi Toh Hai
Mera Dil Hai, Mera Dil Hai, Haan Dil Hi Toh Hai

Tujhe Apna Samajhne Wala

snippet.description:
Presenting рЯОґвЬ®"Aawas" -- Sung by Bintu Pabra & Shiva Choudhary -- 
Watch now and enjoy the latest Haryanvi songs, music videos, and regional hits all in one place.  @ZeeMusicHaryanvi  рЯОґрЯОµ

Song Credits:
Song name - Aawas
Singer, Lyrics, Composer - Bintu Pabra
Female vocals вАУ Shiva Choudhary
Music - Sihag Muzik
Featuring - Bintu Pabra & Shivani Yadav

Video By - The Sixth sense 
Director - Hemant Indora 
Dop - Vishal sharma 
AD - Parvesh Rathee
Edit - Bharat Mittal 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Makeup - Happy 
Production - Deepesh Rakheja 
Asst. Production- Nitin
Guest appearance - Harry Solanki

Lyrics- 
Female-
Mare Jaoge Mare Jaoge 
Koi Nishana Chuk Gya To Samjho Maare Jaoge 
Saare Jaoge Tum Saare Jaoge Tere Circle Me Jitne Saare Maare Jaoge 
Male-
Ho Tukkke Konya Teer Nishane Lage 
Jine Gore Pite Daade Jive Jage 
Asle Sukhe Chaat Pe Chori . Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Re Sher Na Lad De Ghas Pe Chori Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Re Goli Chaljya Taas Pe Chori 
Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
 
Female-
Ek To Teri Gaadi Tuja Tu Radke Hai Aankhya Me 
Male-
Yaar Ne Rahna Sikhya Se Swaada Or Vivada Main 
Female-
Ho Chaa Main Feem Ke Tole Chale Fair Ye Ole Sole Chale 
Male-
Vo Goli Kha Kha Neend Leve Mhaare Jin Ki Gelya Role Chale 
Female-
Bahm Palrya Se Tu Bahm Palrya Se Overconfidence Main Chore Galt Chal Rya Se 
Male-
Mhara He Hak Hoya Kre Bairi Ki Aakhri Sans Pe Chori 
Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Asle Sukhe 
 
Female-
Ram Ratya Kar Pun Karya Kar Kyu Pad Rya Se Papa Main 
Male-
Ib Jahr Te Dar Ni Lagta Ghne Rah Liye Saapa Main 
Famale-
Aweed Asle Rakhte Ho Or Rakhte Ho Lincenr Bhi 
Male-
Pahla Bhi Mne Kah Di Re Hum Ghunde Bhi Financer Bhi 
Female-
Okhi Jindgi Se Ha Okhi Jindgi Se Jis Dhal Bair Tne Pale Fer Ya Thode Din Ki Se 
Male-
Fer Bhid Dekhiye Lash Pe Chori malik mara ke Laas pe chori
Asle Sukhe Chaat Pe Chori . Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Re Sher Na Lad De Ghas Pe Chori Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Re Goli Chaljya Taas Pe Chori 
Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori 
Aayiye Kde Aawas Pe Chori

snippet.title: Jigari Dosta Video Song [4K] | Hulibeera | Rural Anjan, Chaitra | Malu Nipanal,Shivani |Veer Samarth
snippet.description:
The Ultimate Bond of Brotherhood! "Jigari Dosta" 4K Video Song вАУ "Hulibeera". рЯСКрЯФ•рЯОґ

Celebrate true friendship with the rocking track "Jigari Dosta" from the movie Hulibeera. Featuring the vibrant performances of Rural Anjan and Chaitra, this song is a tribute to the "Jigari" bonds that last a lifetime!

With power-packed vocals by Malu Nipanal and Shivani Swami, and energetic music composed by Veer Samarth, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the rhythmic beats and high-definition visuals in stunning 4K, Directed by Madarangi Mallikarjun.

localized.title: Jigari Dosta Video Song [4K] | Hulibeera | Rural Anjan, Chaitra | Malu Nipanal,Shivani |Veer Samarth
localized.description:
The Ultimate Bond of Brotherhood! "Jigari Dosta" 4K Video Song вАУ "Hulibeera". рЯСКрЯФ•рЯОґ

Celebrate true friendship with the rocking track "Jigari Dosta" from the movie Hulibeera. Featuring the vibrant performances of Rural Anjan and Chaitra, this song is a tribute to the "Jigari" bonds that last a lifetime!

With power-packed vocals by Malu Nipanal and Shivani Swami, and energetic music composed by Veer Samarth, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the rhythmic beats and high-definition visuals in stunning 4K, Directed by Madarangi Mallikarjun.

-------------------

Song : Jigri Dosta 
Singer : Malu Nipanal & Shivani Swami
Music Director: Veer Samarth

snippet.title: JANTA : JASS BAJWA | MANDEEP MAAVI | JATTCODE | DESI CREW | LATEST PUNJABI SONGS 2026 | PUNJABI SONG
snippet.description:
рЯФ• MEE MUZIC proudly presents **"JANTA"** вАУ a high-energy Punjabi anthem from the much-awaited album **JATTCODE**. Bringing his signature style, powerful voice, and unmatched attitude, **Jass Bajwa** delivers a track that speaks directly to the masses. Packed with impactful lyrics by **Mandeep Maavi** and hard-hitting music by **Desi Crew**, "JANTA" is set to become a favorite on every Punjabi music playlist.

Turn up the volume and experience the vibe of **JANTA**!

рЯОµ Song: JANTA
рЯО§ Singer: Jass Bajwa
вЬНпЄП Lyrics: Mandeep Maavi
рЯТњ Album: JATTCODE
рЯОґ Music: Desi Crew
рЯОЪпЄП Mix & Master: Dense
рЯОђ Video: Tru Makers
рЯО• Director: Dilsher Singh & Khushpal Singh
рЯПЈпЄП Label: Mee Muzic

Costume:- Rajat Manchanda
chief AD:- Gurdeep singh
Creative director:- Shamsher Singh
Casting:- Snehpreet kaur ( punjwood casting)
production:- V sign (mani Gill)
Catering: Sonu buttar

La La La La La Ah Ha
La La La La La La Hey
La La La La La La La 
Laa Laa

Yun Mohabbbat Se Mujhko Na Dekha Karo
Meri Chaahat Meri Arzoo Ke Liye
Apni Masoomiyat Ko Na Ruswa Karo

snippet.title: Dur Jane Se Kya Hoga вАУ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Dur Jane Se Kya Hoga вАУ Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Dur jane se kya hoga...
agar dil me mohabbat baaki hai.

Faasle badh jaane se
ehsaas nahi badalte...
sachcha pyaar kabhi
waqt ke saath nahi dhalta.

Tum door zaroor ho...
magar meri har dua me aaj bhi ho.

Har raat teri yaadon ke saath guzarti hai...
aur har subah tera intezar lekar aati hai.

вАЬDur Jane Se Kya HogaвАЭ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo juda hokar bhi
mohabbat karna nahi chhodta.

Kuch rishte
saath rehkar nahi...
ehsaason se zinda rehte hain.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
intezar bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai вАФ

dur jane se kya hoga...
agar dil aaj bhi tumhara hai...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur usse door rehna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

рЯОЩпЄП Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
рЯОІ Vibe: Emotional вАҐ Deep вАҐ Heartbreak вАҐ Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)
